description_long: This is a modern sailing yacht with a sleek white hull and a single tall mast supporting a large triangular mainsail. The deck features a light wood finish with metal railings running along the perimeter, and the cockpit area is recessed towards the stern, offering seating and access to the interior. The hull has several dark-tinted rectangular windows along the sides, providing natural light to the cabin below. The bow is sharply pointed, enhancing the vessel's hydrodynamic profile, while the stern is broad and slightly elevated. The yacht's superstructure includes a low-profile cabin with a smooth, aerodynamic shape and a few visible hatches. Overall, the vessel exudes a sense of luxury and performance, suitable for both leisure cruising and competitive sailing.
description: A sleek, modern white sailing yacht with a tall mast, wood-finished deck, and dark side windows, featuring a streamlined hull and recessed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, tall mast, and the narrow profile of the hull.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the hull, large mainsail, wood deck, and multiple side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad stern, cockpit seating area, and the arrangement of the deck and railings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the hull's length, sail, and window placement from the other side.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a sharp, pointed bow and a broad, slightly elevated stern. The hull is smooth and white with dark-tinted rectangular windows along the sides. No visible keels or chines are present, and the hull has a streamlined, modern profile.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level deck with a light wood finish, surrounded by metal railings. The cockpit is recessed at the stern, featuring seating and access to the interior. Walkways run along both sides, and there are visible hatches and deck fittings for sail handling.
attribute_cabin_structure: Low-profile cabin structure with a smooth, aerodynamic exterior. Several rectangular windows are visible on the sides, and there are hatches on the deck. No doors are visible from the exterior views.
